chapter_title.ar: باب مَا يُسْتَحَبُّ مِنْ تَزْوِيجِ النِّسَاءِ عِنْدَ بُلُوغِهِنَّ وَ تَحْصِينِهِنَّ بِالْأَزْوَاجِ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 19 – What is reckoned from the marriages of the women during their puberty, and fortifying them with the marriage

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (0/30)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (0/30)
text: قَالَ أَمِيرُ الْمُؤْمِنِينَ ( عليه السلام ) فِي بَعْضِ كَلَامِهِ إِنَّ السِّبَاعَ هَمُّهَا بُطُونُهَا وَ إِنَّ النِّسَاءَ هَمُّهُنَّ الرِّجَالُ .

en.hubeali: Ali Bin Muhammad, from Ibn Jamhour, from his father, raising it, said,
‘Amir Al-Momineen<sup>asws</sup> said in one of his<sup>asws</sup> speeches that the wild animal, their keenness is their bellies, and the women, their keenness is the men’.
en.sarwar: 5. Ali ibn Muhammad has narrated from ibn Jumhur from his father in a marfu’ manner who has said the following: “’Amir al-Mu’minin, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, in certain parts of his speech has said, ‘The ambition of beasts is to fill their stomach, and the ambition of women is to find men.’”
